title: 有馬記念の後に・努力より尊いもの

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Writing her own legend as she goes, Mejiro Ryan
surpasses the superstar Oguri Cap and claims
victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In her post-race interview, she declares that her
glorious victory is all thanks to her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the wake of her defeat, Oguri Cap's
captivation with Mejiro Ryan's racing leads her to
tell Ryan that she wants to continue racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan has grown so much that she's begun
to charm even the superstar racers.
